design_philosophy.core_loop: Vertically scrolling shooter with enemy wave navigation and resource collection
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Dodge incoming enemy fire while maintaining offensive output; convert defeated enemies into collectable fruit items for scoring
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Pilot a floating fortress through an insect and skull-themed aerial gauntlet, transforming threats into collectables
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Unique enemy-to-fruit conversion mechanic as core reward system; commitment to mysterious, anxiety-inducing atmosphere through art direction and music despite arcade genre conventions of clarity

faction_indicators: Insect swarms as organized threat formations
environmental_storytelling: Enemy theming (insects + death imagery) creating surreal threat landscape

sources_used: wikipedia: Savage Bees article - gameplay description, reception notes, designer credits, mechanical emphasis on fruit conversion
